summary: Classified the ten live PR inventory items independently from the hydrated artifact. No GitHub mutations are planned: instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled for this job, and no PR is boringly closable under the provided evidence. Several focused PRs need maintainer review or author/proof follow-up before any future merge path.

actions.reason: Focused contributor PR with sufficient proof but maintainer review and rebase/dependency-guard follow-up remain outside this job's allowed actions.
Keep open for proof/author follow-up; it is a plausible focused fix, but failed proof blocks any close, fixed-by, or merge classification.
Keep open as related to the Matrix issue; draft state and review changes make it author-follow-up work, not an inventory closeout.
Focused Teams message-delivery fix with author follow-up and passing proof; maintainer technical review is the remaining decision and merge/fix actions are disabled.
Medium feature/config behavior change with maintainer signal and failing relevant branch checks; this requires maintainer/repair review, but fix and merge are disabled.
Keep open as a plausible related fix for #58139; proof/status and maintainer review state are not clean enough for a stronger close or fixed-by classification.
Keep open for author/repair follow-up; the PR is useful-looking but dirty and has unresolved review concerns.
Focused Telegram-visible fix with proof and no hydrated unresolved review comments; maintainer review/rebase is the remaining path, but merge/fix are disabled.
Small docs PR with clean evidence but maintainer/rebase signal remains; no close or merge action is allowed in this job.
Actionable review-bot P1 technical concern remains in the hydrated artifact; this PR needs maintainer or author resolution before any future merge/fixed-by path.
